title: Surgeon Vacancy at Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Indore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services:
Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services!
